emotions.name: joy
emotions.desc: 开心、明亮、轻快、愉悦地说话

emotions.name: angry
emotions.desc: 生气、火大、不服、烦躁上头的语气

emotions.name: embarrased
emotions.desc: 害羞、尴尬、腼腆、不好意思的语气

emotions.name: disgust
emotions.desc: 嫌弃、反感、无语、厌恶的语气

emotions.name: neutral
emotions.desc: 平静、柔和、自然、放松的中性语气

emotions.name: sad
emotions.desc: 难过、低落、委屈、失落的语气

emotions.name: surprised
emotions.desc: 惊讶、意外、被吓到、情绪骤然变化的语气

emotions.name: wonder
emotions.desc: 好奇、期待、想继续追问、眼前一亮的语气

motions.name: idle
motions.desc: 待机、放松站立、安静等待

motions.name: affirm
motions.desc: 肯定、赞同、用力点头确认

motions.name: arms_crossed
motions.desc: 双臂交叉抱胸、防备、冷静旁观

motions.name: arms_open
motions.desc: 张开双臂、欢迎、拥抱、敞开心扉

motions.name: cheek_rest
motions.desc: 单手托腮、发呆、若有所思

motions.name: chin_rest
motions.desc: 手托下巴、沉思、认真听讲

motions.name: dance
motions.desc: 跳舞、开心摇摆、随节奏律动

motions.name: fists_up
motions.desc: 握拳举起、加油、干劲十足

motions.name: hands_behind_back
motions.desc: 背手站立、乖巧、等待指示

motions.name: hands_cover_face
motions.desc: 捂脸、害羞到不行、不想被看到

motions.name: hands_on_chin
motions.desc: 双手托下巴、认真倾听、专注

motions.name: hands_on_hips
motions.desc: 叉腰、不服气、气鼓鼓、理直气壮

motions.name: head_tilt
motions.desc: 歪头、疑惑、可爱地歪一下

motions.name: look_around
motions.desc: 东张西望、环顾四周、警觉

motions.name: look_right
motions.desc: 看向右边、回避、移开视线

motions.name: praying
motions.desc: 双手合十、拜托了、祈求、感恩

motions.name: shrugging
motions.desc: 耸肩、无所谓、我也没办法

motions.name: stretch
motions.desc: 伸懒腰、放松、累了、打哈欠

motions.name: thinking
motions.desc: 思考、认真想、手指点太阳穴
